recommendations: Resolve hard live diagnostics blockers before using this trace as G2 acceptance evidence.
AGC gain moved more than 12 dB during the trace; run the agc-level-step fixture and listen for pumping before tuning NR.
NR5 output RMS moved more than 6 dB during the trace; inspect nr5RecoveryDrive and nr5MakeupGainDb before tuning mask thresholds.
liveRecommendedActions: Capture a G2 live benchmark run and compare against the offline fixture baseline before changing any default.
Reduce RX leveler boost, front-end gain, or plugin output before collecting DSP acceptance audio.
